intent: Streamline human resource operations, including employee lifecycle management, payroll processing, and performance tracking.

entities.name: EmployeeRecord
entities.description: Stores comprehensive profile information, lifecycle status, and employment history.

entities.name: PayrollEngine
entities.description: Handles automated salary calculations, tax withholdings, and integration with financial systems.

entities.name: PerformanceManagement
entities.description: Tracks goals, KPIs, and performance reviews associated with individual employees.

entities.name: AccessControlModule
entities.description: Manages user permissions and roles to ensure secure, authorized data access.

entities.name: ComplianceManager
entities.description: Monitors and enforces regional labor law standards and data privacy requirements.

entities.name: DataMigrationService
entities.description: Facilitates the extraction, transformation, and loading of historical data from legacy systems.

architecture.description: The system streamlines HR by centralizing employee data in a secure, role-based environment. It begins with the DataMigrationService importing legacy records, which are then governed by the AccessControlModule and ComplianceManager to ensure security and legal alignment. The EmployeeRecord serves as the core database, feeding into the PerformanceManagement module for talent assessment and the PayrollEngine for accurate compensation processing, which subsequently syncs with external accounting platforms.

validation_rules: all fields must be valid JSON schema types
salary_base must be a positive number
kpis must be provided in JSON format

endpoints.summary: List all security roles and permissions

components.content: Overview of system status and active migrations
Add new performance review and KPIs

rules.description: Ensure mandatory fields for EmployeeRecord are populated during migration
rules.logic: If DataMigrationService imports a record, validate presence of unique employee identifier, tax ID, and start date. Reject record if any mandatory field is null.

rules.description: Enforce role-based access for salary data updates
rules.logic: Salary modification in PayrollEngine is only permitted if AccessControlModule validates the user has 'FinanceManager' or 'HRAdmin' role.
An EmployeeRecord cannot transition from 'Active' to 'Terminated' unless a final performance review is documented in PerformanceManagement and payroll settlement is confirmed by PayrollEngine.

rules.description: Compliance check for regional labor laws
rules.logic: Before confirming any salary calculation, ComplianceManager must verify that the compensation structure aligns with the regional minimum wage and labor standards stored in the ComplianceManager database.

rules.description: Prevent duplicate records during data migration
rules.logic: Compare incoming legacy records against existing EmployeeRecord identifiers; if a match is found, trigger an update log rather than creating a new record.
Performance reviews are marked as 'Locked' once finalized; any modification requires an audit trail entry and manager-level authorization through AccessControlModule.
